reasoning_messages.reasoning: I plan to remediate “Enable Certmap in SSSD” by first reading `/etc/sssd/sssd.conf`. I’ll back up the file, then locate the last `[domain/... ]` stanza (using a regex like `^\[domain/.+\]`). After that, I’ll insert the `certmap` configuration block immediately after that domain line. I’ll test the new config with `sssd -t`, reload the service (`systemctl reload sssd`), and verify the status. All steps will be executed with `run_cmd` and `write_file` as needed.
